## Checklist

- [ ] Base branch is **`preview`** (not `main`)
- [ ] **Accessible** — keyboard operable, correct roles/labels, visible focus
- [ ] **Works in light and dark** (semantic tokens for chrome)
- [ ] **Self-contained** — every npm package in `dependencies`, every registry
      item in `registryDependencies`
- [ ] **Responsive** — looks right from mobile to wide screens
- [ ] Set the `author` field to credit myself (or left it off to use the default)
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and `npm run build` all pass
